items.title: Profile Parameter Data Architecture + Value Correctness
items.description:
Eliminate hardcoded slicer dropdown values in engine.js. Move all parameter values to objective_profiles.json as BS-compatible values. Fix broken exports (zig-zag bug), add missing ironing_pattern field, expand support_style to 5 options with use-case awareness. Architectural principle: data files store BS JSON values, engine maps to display strings, export is passthrough.

Root bugs: internal_solid_infill_pattern exports 'zig-zag' (invalid), ironing_pattern never exported, seam_position shows wrong labels, support_style uses 2 of 5 options. Spec: IMPL-036-profile-params.md.
implementation: Phase A — objective_profiles.json: add seam_position, only_one_wall_top, ironing_type, ironing_pattern, internal_solid_infill_pattern to all 6 surface_quality entries; remove legacy ironing (bool) and seam_aligned (bool)

Phase B — engine.js resolveProfile(): replace 5 hardcoded blocks with data reads + SEAM_DISPLAY / IRONING_DISPLAY / INTERNAL_INFILL_DISPLAY lookup tables; expand support_style to tree_slim/strong/hybrid/organic by use case

Phase C — engine.js export: fix zig-zag bug, add ironing_pattern to PARAM_MAP, expand support_style transform (2→5 options), update SLICER_TABS to split ironing → ironing_type + ironing_pattern across all 3 slicers
Verify: import into Bambu Studio and confirm ironing, solid infill, seam, support style all load correctly

items.title: Smart Simple/Advanced Configurator Mode
items.description: Extend the Simple/Advanced toggle to control configurator input — not just output. Simple mode shows fewer filters with sensible defaults pre-applied; Advanced shows all 12 filters unchanged.
implementation: Audit resolveProfile() to verify defaults don't cause unexpected output
engine.js — add simpleVisible flag + SIMPLE_DEFAULTS constant to filter definitions
app.js — update buildFilters() to skip hidden filters; setMode() to apply/clear defaults

items.title: AMS Purge Volume Calculator
items.description: Restore the previously-shipped purge calculator. Users select active AMS slots (2–4), assign brightness levels, and get a flush volume matrix per source→target transition adjusted by material multiplier.
implementation: engine.js — restore purge calculation logic
app.js — restore purgeState, renderPurgeCalculator(), nav listener, setView('purge')
index.html — restore #navPurge button and #viewPurge container
style.css — restore .purge-* styles
locales/en.json + da.json — purge strings already present, verify they render

items.title: Copy Individual Setting Value
items.description: Click a value in the results panel to copy it to clipboard with a brief 'Copied!' flash. Eliminates the most frequent manual step users take when transferring values to their slicer.
implementation: app.js — wrap param value in <span class="copy-value">; click → clipboard.writeText(); toggle .copied for ~1.5s
style.css — pointer cursor, hover highlight, tooltip animation

items.title: Shareable Profile URL
items.description: Encode active filter selections as URL query params so a profile can be shared via link. On page load, params pre-populate all selectors before running the engine.
implementation: app.js — read URLSearchParams on DOMContentLoaded, pre-populate appState
app.js — call history.replaceState() with updated query params on each state change

items.title: Troubleshooter Expansion
items.description: Expand from 8 to 20+ symptoms: nozzle clog, layer shifting, z-banding, wet filament, poor overhangs, bridging failure. Each with 3–5 ranked causes, diagnostic steps, and setting recommendations.
implementation: data/troubleshooter.json — add symptom entries with ranked causes
engine.js — extend cause ranking by active printer/material context

items.title: More Printer Support
items.description: Add Bambu Lab A1 Combo, Prusa MK4, Prusa XL, Voron 2.4, Creality K1 Max. Each requires printer-specific rule coverage for warnings and speed/temp limits.
implementation: data/printers.json — add entries with full printer fields
engine.js — audit warning rules for Bambu-specific assumptions; add overrides for Prusa/Voron

items.title: More Material Support
items.description: Add PLA+, PLA Sparkle, PETG Transparent, PA12-CF, PPA-CF, ABS-GF. Each requires warning rule coverage for enclosure, nozzle hardness, and drying requirements.
implementation: data/materials.json — add entries with speed multiplier, enclosure/nozzle/drying requirements
engine.js — extend warnings for CF/GF materials (hardened nozzle, enclosure, drying)

items.title: Parameter Tooltip / Info Panel
items.description: Clicking ⓘ next to a parameter opens a modal explaining what it controls, why this value was chosen, and what increasing/decreasing it does. Turns the tool into a learning resource.
implementation: data/param-info.json — entries keyed by param ID with description, whyThisValue, increaseEffect, decreaseEffect in EN/DA
app.js — click handler on ⓘ icons; render <dialog> modal with content
style.css — modal backdrop, card, close button

items.title: JSDoc Typedefs for Core Engine Objects
items.description: Add @typedef annotations for State, Profile, Warning, PrinterDef, MaterialDef, NozzleDef, Param. Zero runtime cost — unlocks VS Code autocomplete and catches property misuse without TypeScript.
implementation: engine.js — add @typedef blocks near top; annotate return types on public functions
app.js — annotate state object and key variables with @type

items.title: Engine Modularization (ES Modules)
items.description: Split engine.js into native ES modules (no bundler needed). Public Engine API re-exported from engine/index.js. Only pursue when engine is actively growing and the monolith slows development.
implementation: Create engine/ directory; split into index.js, data-loader.js, i18n.js, profile.js, warnings.js, troubleshooter.js, estimator.js
index.html — add type="module"; update script src
Verify app.js works unchanged; remove old engine.js

items.title: Copy All Settings as Formatted Text
items.description: "Copy all" button assembles the active tab's params as label: value plain text — paste-ready for notes, chat, or print logs.
implementation: app.js — button in results header; iterate sections/params; clipboard.writeText(); brief confirmation
style.css — consistent secondary button style

items.title: Expanded Warning Explanations
items.description: Make each warning chip expandable — clicking reveals root cause and 1–2 concrete fix steps. Turns single-line warnings into actionable guidance.
implementation: engine.js — ensure warnings include detail and fix fields
app.js — toggle .expanded on chip click; show detail div
style.css — expand/collapse transition

items.title: Saved Presets (localStorage)
items.description: Name and save current filter state as a preset stored in localStorage; reload from a picker in one click. No backend required.
implementation: app.js — 'Save preset' button; store { name, state } in localStorage; preset picker with delete; validate stale keys on load
style.css — picker and save button styling

items.title: Export as HTML Print Sheet
items.description: Export a self-contained, fully offline HTML file showing all selections and recommended settings — a permanent print reference with no external dependencies.
implementation: engine.js — generateHTMLSheet(state, profile) with inlined CSS
app.js — trigger download via <a href="data:text/html;"> with generated filename

items.title: Source Attribution for Recommendations
items.description: Badge each parameter value as 📋 Brand guideline, 👥 Community tested, or 🔧 Tool calculated. Builds trust and helps users decide how strictly to follow a recommendation.
implementation: engine.js — add source: 'brand' | 'community' | 'calculated' to each param object
data/materials.json — tag base settings per source type
app.js + style.css — subtle badge next to each value; legend tooltip

items.title: Multi-Language Expansion
items.description: Add German (DE), Dutch (NL), Swedish (SV). With locale files now external (#030 shipped), each new language is a pure data task — no engine changes needed.
implementation: locales/de.json, nl.json, sv.json — translate all keys from en.json
app.js — render language toggle buttons dynamically from loaded locale keys

items.title: Filament Database / Brand Profiles
items.description: Secondary Brand selector after material type (e.g. Bambu Lab PLA Basic, Polymaker PolyTerra) with temp/speed overrides from brand datasheets. Generic selection applies no override.
implementation: data/brands.json — { materialId, brandId, tempOverride?, speedOverride?, source }
engine.js — apply brand overrides after base material resolution
app.js + style.css — secondary brand selector under material chips

items.title: Community-Contributed Profiles
items.description: Read-only community profiles submitted via GitHub PR, shown as a 'Community verified' panel alongside the generated profile. Static, reviewer-controlled — no backend needed.
implementation: data/community-profiles.json — { id, contributor, printer, nozzle, material, settings{}, rating, notes }
engine.js — getCommunityProfiles(state) sorted by rating
app.js + style.css — community panel and badges in results

items.title: Auto Dark Mode
items.description: Detect prefers-color-scheme: dark on first visit and apply matching theme. Explicit user toggle stored in localStorage takes priority on subsequent visits.
implementation: app.js — on init, check localStorage; if absent use matchMedia; store explicit choice on toggle; add reactive OS listener

items.title: Print Time Estimator Improvements
items.description: Add acceleration/deceleration modeling, support volume estimation, and a comparison table showing estimated time across Draft/Standard/Fine presets side by side.
implementation: engine.js — extend estimatePrintTime() with accel correction; add estimateAllPresets()
app.js + style.css — comparison table UI with preset columns

items.title: app.js Render/Event Refactor
items.description: Declarative per-view render functions and centralized event registration to reduce DOM coupling and listener duplication risk. Deferred — high risk, low near-term reward. Only pursue if app.js becomes a regression source.
implementation: app.js — extract renderConfigure(), renderTroubleshoot(), renderFeedback() as pure functions
app.js — consolidate all listeners into bindControls() on boot using event delegation

items.title: CI Pipeline
items.description: ESLint + data validation + headless smoke test on push/PR via GitHub Actions. Deferred — low value solo, worth adding when a second contributor joins.
implementation: package.json — lint, test:data, test:smoke scripts
.github/workflows/ci.yml — install → lint → validate → smoke test

items.title: User Profiles & Community Layer
items.description: Optional user accounts (passwordless/social auth) for cross-device preset sync, print history, and community profile sharing. Core tool stays fully functional without login. Major backend complexity for a static tool.
implementation: Phase 1 — Supabase Auth (Google/GitHub); sync localStorage presets to user record
Phase 2 — Auto-save profile snapshots; History view with one-click restore
Phase 3 — Share profile button; Community browse filtered by printer/material

archived.title: Mobile Layout Improvements
archived.description: Single-column results grid, collapsible optional filter sections on mobile, larger touch targets (44px), horizontal-scroll tab nav, and single-column checklist. Confirmed fully implemented in style.css + app.js.

archived.title: Print Checklist / Pre-flight
archived.description: Context-driven pre-flight checklist rendered below the profile tabs. getChecklist() in engine.js returns items with text, detail, and critical flags; renderChecklist() in app.js displays them with ✓/⚠ icons and i18n support.

archived.title: Orca Slicer Layout Support
archived.description: OrcaSlicer tab structure implemented in engine.js (SLICER_TABS). Creality, Anycubic, QIDI, Voron, DIY, and other non-Bambu/Prusa brands automatically use OrcaSlicer layout via getSlicerForPrinter().

archived.title: Match Bambu Studio Process Tab Structure
archived.description: Restructured PROFILE_TABS sections in engine.js to exactly match Bambu Studio's Process tab layout — Quality, Strength, Speed, Support, Others tabs with correct section groupings.

archived.title: Analytics — Cloudflare Web Analytics
archived.description: Added Cloudflare Web Analytics beacon to index.html. Privacy-first, no cookies, GDPR-compliant, free on existing Cloudflare Pages hosting.

archived.title: SEO Optimization
archived.description: Added meta tags, Open Graph, Twitter Card, canonical URL, JSON-LD structured data, sitemap.xml, robots.txt, and semantic HTML improvements.

archived.title: Roadmap Modal in Footer
archived.description: Roadmap link in footer opens a modal listing community-requested features, translated to EN/DA.

archived.title: Slicer-Aware Tab Structure
archived.description: Results panel displays section names and labels matching the slicer for the selected printer brand. Bambu Studio and PrusaSlicer fully implemented.

archived.title: TPU 85A / 90A Print & Support Guidance
archived.description: Added dedicated material entries for TPU 85A and 90A with hardness-specific speed caps, retraction settings, cooling, support guidance, and engine warnings.

archived.title: i18n Locale Extraction
archived.description: Moved all 169 EN + 167 DA translation strings from engine.js into locales/en.json and locales/da.json. Engine.init() fetches them alongside data files.

archived.title: JSON Schema Validation Script
archived.description: scripts/validate-data.js validates all 7 data files against expected schema. Exit 0 = clean, exit 1 = human-readable errors. Run: node scripts/validate-data.js.

archived.title: Profile Export to Bambu Studio .json
archived.description: Generate a valid Bambu Studio process profile .json that users can import directly — eliminating the entire manual transcription step.
implementation: engine.js — exportToBambuStudio(profile) mapping internal params to Bambu Studio field names
data/bambu-field-map.json — param ID → Bambu Studio key + value transformations
app.js — 'Export for Bambu Studio' button triggering file download
